Localization.Description: User SSH key files were changed

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A user with ID {subject.account.id} changed user SSH key file {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
User SSH key files were changed on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} changed user SSH key file {object.fullpath} on host {event_src.host}
User SSH key file {object.fullpath} was changed on host {event_src.host}
A user with ID {subject.account.id} changed user SSH key files on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} changed user SSH key files on host {event_src.host}
